title: (WEST Healthcare) Assistant Manager, Project / Services Costing Planning - Up 5.5K #HJC
description:
Liaise and work closely with various stakeholders in performing actual cost calculation and pricing on existing and new services/ projects.

Perform annual cost refresh/ updates on services.

Work closely with Project Manager in the rollout of new costing system with relevant stakeholders.

Strong understanding in National Costing Guideline and applying it to the services/ various patient setting.

Part of the dynamic team in improvement projects on actuals cost calculation as well as process and efficiencies.

Rationalise and formulate price revision proposal in meeting hospital financial sustainability, taking into consideration patient bill impact.

Responsible in the execution and smooth delivery in any revision in prices with all stakeholders.

Support, review and implement new MOH policies by analysing Hospital’s requirements, include determining feasibility, cost, time and resources required.

Produce concise and value adding reports for regular performance reviews with senior management.

Provide Business partnering support to Business Units within a growing regional healthcare system.

Support the annual budgeting cycle, including financial review and analysis.

Any other ad-hoc duties.

Job Requirements

Degree in quantitative fields such as Accounting/ Finance.

At least 2 years of relevant work experience.

Experience in healthcare industry and public healthcare costing framework is preferred.

Pro-active, resourceful, able to take challenges, work independently or as a team.

Able to work in a dynamic fast paced environment

TELE me at @jacechooo or WA me at https://wa.me/+6582976283 NOW!

Interested candidates please submit your resume to jacechoo@recruitexpress.com.sg

Jace Choo Oi Kei

Personnel EA License No.: R1875164

Recruit Express Pte Ltd (EA Licence No.: 99C4599)

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
